consentForm.acceptBothError: Please accept both agreements to continue.
consentForm.declineMessage: To provide legal telehealth care and protect your privacy, we must have your signed agreement. Exiting now will cancel your booking progress.
consentForm.title: Review & Sign
consentForm.subtitle: Almost done! We just need your legal consent.
consentForm.telehealthP1: Telehealth involves electronic communication technologies to provide care when the provider and patient are not in the same location.
consentForm.telehealthP2: By checking the box, you acknowledge that you understand the limitations of virtual care, including technical risks and the lack of physical examination.
consentForm.telehealthP3: I understand I can withdraw consent at any time without affecting my right to future care or treatment.
consentForm.termsP1: Appointments must be cancelled 24 hours in advance to avoid a no-show fee. Payment is processed securely via our encrypted partner.
consentForm.termsP2: The platform acts as a facilitator and does not directly provide medical advice. All medical outcomes are the responsibility of the licensed practitioner.
consentForm.termsP3: By proceeding, you agree to abide by the platform's legal and ethical policies.
consentForm.agreeText: I have read and agree to the {section}
consentForm.declineTerms: I do not agree to these terms

email.title: Email Confirmation
email.description: You will receive an email to your registered email address with the appointment link. Please check your SPAM folder if you don’t see this email in your inbox.

appointmentDay.title: On Appointment Day
appointmentDay.description: Click on the link provided in your email to join the appointment. Your doctor will join you on time. Make sure you have a stable internet connection and are in a quiet environment.

members.title: Additional Members
members.description: If you selected additional members for this appointment, please forward the appointment link to them so they can join the consultation as well.

followup.title: Follow-up Call
followup.description: Once your appointment is completed, we will call you to see how we did and how we can improve our services. Your feedback is valuable to us.

PaymentConfirmation.footer: Thank you for choosing our telehealth services. We look forward to providing you with excellent care.

practitioner.subtitle: Join Clinecxa to manage your appointments, reach more patients, and streamline your practice with our digital tools.

benefits.1: Reach new patients in your area

hero.subtitle: Connect with certified healthcare professionals from the comfort of your home. Quality care, anytime, anywhere

verified.title: Verified doctors
verified.text: All doctors are vetted and approved before listing

fast.title: Fast booking
fast.text: Book consultations in under a minute

howto.title: How It Works
howto.subtitle: Everything you need to know before booking a telehealth consultation

items.q: How do I create an account?
items.a: Select the service you need and follow the steps to book your appointment. During this process, you can sign up using your email address.

items.q: Can I create an account for a family member?
items.a: Yes. You can create an account for yourself or a family member, and you may also attend the consultation with them.

items.q: How do I book a session with a doctor or specialist?
items.a: Go to the home page and select the service you need. Choose the number of attendees, confirm a date and time, log in or create an account, complete the payment, and you will receive an email with the appointment confirmation and video link.

items.q: How do I know which specialist to book?
items.a: Each specialty is explained on the home page. After selecting a specialist, you can view their expertise, languages spoken, and profile details. If unsure, you may book a general practitioner first.

items.q: Can I reschedule or cancel an appointment?
items.a: Yes. If you cancel or reschedule at least 12 hours before your appointment, there is no fee. Changes within 12 hours may incur a fee.

items.q: What do I need for the video call?
items.a: You only need a smartphone, tablet, or computer with internet access. Ensure your camera and microphone are enabled.

items.q: What if my internet connection drops?
items.a: You can rejoin the consultation using the same link. If issues continue, the clinician may switch to an audio call or reschedule.
Yes. Consultations are never recorded. Only you and your clinician have access unless you invite an additional attendee.

items.q: How can I send reports to the doctor?
items.a: During booking, you can upload up to three medical documents or photos, which will be shared directly with your doctor.

items.q: How do I receive a prescription?
items.a: Prescriptions are sent as images via our official WhatsApp number. This number is not a direct line to the doctor.

items.q: Can I get a medical certificate?
items.a: No. Under Sri Lankan regulations, medical certificates cannot be issued through telehealth without a physical examination.

items.q: How do I pay for my appointment?
items.a: You can pay using debit/credit cards or supported Sri Lankan mobile payment methods.
Yes. Payments are processed through secure gateways and card details are never stored.
Any smartphone, tablet, or computer with a stable internet connection, camera, and microphone.

items.q: What should I do if I cannot join the video call?
items.a: Check your internet connection and browser permissions. If the issue persists, contact our support team.

items.q: Are the clinicians qualified and registered?
items.a: Yes. All clinicians are verified Sri Lankan medical professionals registered with relevant medical councils.

footer.disclaimerText: Please do not use this service for emergencies or if you require medical certificates.For emergencies: Go to your nearest hospital or emergency service immediately, or call 110. For medical certificates or physical examinations: Please visit a doctor in person, as these services cannot be provided through telehealth. This platform is intended only for telehealth consultations that do not require in-person care.

story.title: The Founder’s Story
story.para1: Our journey began with someone very close to our founder—his little sister. She is autistic, and for her, everyday environments can feel overwhelming. A trip to the doctor, which most of us take for granted, was a source of intense anxiety.
story.para2: While living abroad, Nidesh watched his parents handle these exhausting appointments alone. He realized that telehealth should be a necessity for dignity and comfort, not just a video call.
story.quote: I wondered why Sri Lanka didn’t have something like this. Existing attempts were technology-first, not people-first. They weren’t shaped by the realities of Sri Lankan families.
story.para3: He returned to the drawing board and spent months speaking with doctors and patients. Built from personal savings, Clinecxa was created to provide a kinder way to access care for everyone.

vision.text: To be Sri Lanka’s number-one telehealth service: where patients feel safe, care is stress-free, clinicians thrive, and privacy is uncompromised.
vision.label: Clinecxa Vision

trust.title: Trust and Safety First
trust.description: Every decision, from clinical workflows to data security, is driven by an uncompromising commitment to ethics, privacy, and patient safety.

quality.title: Medical Quality First
quality.description: Clinecxa is clinically led. Technology exists to support great medicine and enhance care, never to override professional clinical judgment.

equality.title: Equal Care for All
equality.description: We exist to remove barriers. We believe every patient and clinician deserves equal access to high-quality tools regardless of location.

founder.greeting: Hi friend, thank you for being here.
founder.para1: Clinecxa was born because I watched my sister struggle with appointments and wanted to support my family from afar. I realized healthcare shouldn't add to a family's burden.
founder.para2: I also saw the challenges clinicians face. By giving doctors better tools and a better work-life balance, we ensure they can provide even better care to their patients.
founder.para3: Our mission is to put people first—patients, caregivers, and clinicians alike. We are building something safer and more compassionate for everyone.
